query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN mvSceneStatus = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mvSceneStatus = 'generating' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mvSceneStatus = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mvSceneStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  MAX(updatedAt) as lastUpdate
FROM musicVideoScenes
WHERE jobId = 540001;
